title: Indian Railways Gets Record Rs 2.78 Lakh Crore Boost: Faster Trains, Safer Travel, Better Stations Ahead
description: Indian Railways enters a new era with a record Rs 2.78 lakh crore budget allocation for 2026‑27. Plans include seven high‑speed rail corridors, advanced safety systems, digital upgrades, and modern station redevelopment to deliver faster, safer, and smarter travel for passengers.
